talk_metadata.talk_title: Agentic AI for Accelerating Biomedical Discovery

key_data_gaps: No benchmark against existing AI tools

talk_metadata.talk_title: Foundation Models and Virtual Cells for Single‑Cell Biology

key_data_gaps: No prospective validation on patient cohorts
Limited discussion of model robustness to batch effects

talk_metadata.talk_title: Real‑World Deployment of Clinical AI for Early Sepsis Detection
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "the models stay performant, and we understand performance as we implement and deploy them"
Speaker noted: "alerts were happening after treatment had already initiated"

trial_dilution_risk.target_biology: Early detection of sepsis in hospitalized patients
trial_dilution_risk.flawed_enrollment_criteria: No explicit mention of stratification by cancer status, leading to mixed oncology and non‑oncology cohorts
trial_dilution_risk.missing_biomarker: No incorporation of tumor‑specific biomarkers that could affect sepsis risk
trial_dilution_risk.statistical_concern: Potential underpowering for subgroup analyses (oncology patients)

key_data_gaps: Long‑term impact on mortality beyond the reported study period

crispro_opportunity.description: Integrate CrisPRO’s biomarker stratification to enhance sepsis risk models for oncology patients
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker highlighted that current alerts miss many cases and lack early detection, especially in oncologic patients
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can provide tumor‑specific risk signatures to personalize sepsis prediction

cited_competitors.name: GPT‑4o
cited_competitors.context: used as a benchmark for reasoning models

unresolved_questions: How does model performance vary across different cancer subtypes?
What are the mechanisms of false positives in the AI‑driven sepsis alerts?

talk_metadata.talk_title: Foundation Models for Computational Pathology and Virtual Patient Representations

key_data_gaps: No prospective clinical validation of virtual patient embeddings
Limited discussion of regulatory considerations for pathology AI

crispro_opportunity.description: Apply CrisPRO to identify molecular sub‑signatures within whole‑slide embeddings for therapy selection
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker described using multimodal embeddings to predict treatment response directly from histology
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can overlay its computational spine to extract and validate predictive biomarkers from the embeddings

cited_competitors.name: Arc Institute
cited_competitors.context: their virtual cell model State was used as a benchmark

cited_competitors.name: Google
cited_competitors.context: mentioned for their model Cell to Sentence

unresolved_questions: How will the virtual patient representation handle longitudinal updates in real time?
What is the performance of the model on rare cancer subtypes?
